summary: List Recycled Company Action Plan Templates
description: Returns a list of Recycled Company Action Plan Templates for a given company.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[deleted_at]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) deleted within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[deleted_by_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) deleted by the specified User IDs

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[type_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a specific Action Plan Type ID or a range of Action Plan Type IDs.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

created_at.description: Time the Company Action Plan Template was created

deleted_at.description: Timestamp of when the Company Action Plan Template was deleted

deleted_by.description: Name of individual who deleted the Company Action Plan Template

description.description: Description of the Company Action Plan Template in rich text form

description_plain_text.description: Description of the Company Action Plan Template in plain text form

status.description: Status of the Company Action Plan Template

title.description: Title of the Company Action Plan Template

active.description: Flag indicating if Action Plan Type is intended for use

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the Company Action Plan Template was updated
